commit_message:
Gpio straps func cov Gpio straps func cov Assertions and consequently coverage for the strap feature to check the proper behaviour of strap snapshot based on input/output signals.
It should be merged on top of the PR 
https://github.com/lowRISC/opentitan/pull/26655

examples.commit_message:
Gpio straps func cov Gpio straps func cov Assertions and consequently coverage for the strap feature to check the proper behaviour of strap snapshot based on input/output signals.
It should be merged on top of the PR 
https://github.com/lowRISC/opentitan/pull/26655

Gpio straps func cov Gpio straps func cov Assertions and consequently coverage for the strap feature to check the proper behaviour of strap snapshot based on input/output signals.
It should be merged on top of the PR 
https://github.com/lowRISC/opentitan/pull/26655
examples.patch:
@@ -20,4 +20,14 @@ module gpio_bind;
     .d2h    (tl_o)
   );
 
+  bind gpio gpio_strap_check #(.NUM_GPIOS($bits(cio_gpio_i)))
+  gpio_strap_assert (
+    .clk_i,
+    .rst_ni,
+    .strap_en_i,
+    .strap_valid(sampled_straps_o.valid),
+    .strap_data(sampled_straps_o.data),
+    .gpio_i(cio_gpio_i)
+  );
+
 endmodule
